item.dc:creator: thespacewired

item.title: Snowball fight? IT'S ON!
item.description:
Ok, not snowballs! ;) Some people call these Butterballs, Russian Tea Cakes, or Swedish Heirloom cookies.
In tradition, I make these every year.... usually as a present because they taste TOO good... like to the point where they could be addictive. ;) Recipe: 1 cup butter 1 cup powdered sugar (plus another half pound) 1/2 tsp salt ...blend these.... whip em, beat em, etc. 1.5 cups ground (any nut - pecans, almonds) I have a nut grinder. 1 Tbsp vanilla extract 2 cups of sifted (or flasked) flour.... you don't need a sifter, but make sure your flour doesn't have any clumps! Cream the sugar, butter, vanilla, and salt... does it look like cream? Good. If not, then keep combining them. Just mix them. Gradually add the flour and mix it in until it's consistent. Add your nuts! Combine the nuts, with whatever tool you have... hands, mixer, w/e. Use parchment paper for the next step. Roll into balls and bake at preset 325F for 16 minutes. After baking, let sit for about 10 minutes before rolling in powdered sugar. Repeat this process once or twice, depending how sweet you are. ;) Any questions, feel free to ask. I don't think I left anything out, but conversion rates. (Metric? Idk) Happy Holidays! :)
item.dc:creator: mrpink83

item.title: Polar Bear Comes Across a Hole in the Ice and Takes a Polar Plunge
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Music Trivia Department #21 - You’ve Got A Friend
item.description: James Taylor played & sang on Carole King’s first solo album, & convinced her to play in his live band. Her second solo album was the 30 million copies-selling Tapestry. While they were never romantically linked they’ve been friends for over 50 years.
item.dc:creator: ialoneambest

item.title: I'm bored! So I took a dump.
item.description:
I've put the images and gifs without sound or ones that don't need it at the beginning.
Everything from here down either needs to be unmuted or is better with sound.
No cat tax, she passed away. Have the creepy pigeon that's been watching me all day instead.

item.dc:creator: lunarcatsss

item.title: This is Reggie. He is not a snowball...for the weak
item.description: Our boy Reggie passed from mouth cancer in 2021. He was nervous until he realized who you were, but we adopted him from an abusive environment. He was so loved and cared for by our oldest. He would have hated to be thrown. Sorry for the clickbate title. #pleasethrowsnow *editing to say, I just meant you should throw snowballs and not spikey balls - I'm not super clear on the snowball button thingy for Imgur. Not asking for that! ::anxiety brain::
item.dc:creator: jenhiMlemBaron

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 193
item.description: It’s the final numbered Idiots post of 2024! I’ll be back with a “best of 2024” edition on New Year’s Eve. I’m still tabulating the winners and of course this dump needs to be in the running too!
